name: Fetish-Inator
description:
One boring day, while browsing the deep web, you came across a listing for mystery boxes. Out of curiosity, you decided to buy one. When it arrived, you felt scammed because it was full of junk—but at the bottom, there was an object called the “Fetish-Inator,” which promised to change everything—from a person’s personality and appearance to even their gender.

Tell me in the comments if there are any mistakes.
